sentences.arabic: أَوْقَفْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ فِي الشَّارِعِ وَأَخْبَرْتُ السَّائِقَ بِعُنْوَانِ الْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Zaustavio sam taksi na ulici i rekao vozaču adresu mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: I stopped a taxi in the street and told the driver the address.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُفَضِّلُهُ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ الطَّرِيقُ الأَسْرَعُ.
sentences.translation: Upitao me koji put preferira pa sam mu rekao najbrži.
sentences.translationEn: He asked which route I preferred and I said the fastest.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثْنَا قَلِيلًا عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَأَعْطَانِي بَعْضَ النَّصَائِحَ السِّيَاحِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Malo smo razgovarali o gradu i dao mi je neke turističke savjete.
sentences.translationEn: We chatted a little about the city and he gave me some tourist tips.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى وِجْهَتِي فِي عَشَرِ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam do odredišta za deset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at my destination in ten minutes.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعْتُ الأُجْرَةَ وَأَضَفْتُ بَقْشِيشًا صَغِيرًا لِحُسْنِ خِدْمَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Platio sam i dodao mali bakšiš za dobru uslugu.
sentences.translationEn: I paid and added a small tip for the good service.
